name: Classic Leather Bag
description: A timeless masterpiece crafted from premium full-grain leather. This bag features a spacious main compartment, dedicated laptop sleeve, and hand-finished stitching for durability and style.

reviews.comment: Exceptional quality. The leather feels very premium.
Beautiful design, though a bit heavier than expected.

name: Precision Timepiece
description: Engineered for accuracy and elegance. This sapphire-crystal timepiece features a Japanese quartz movement, stainless steel casing, and water resistance up to 50 meters.

reviews.comment: Stunning watch. Gets compliments every time I wear it.

name: Urban Sneakers
description: Versatile sneakers designed for the modern explorer. Featuring breathable mesh upper, responsive cushioning, and a high-traction rubber outsole.

name: Noir Sunglasses
description: Stay sharp with these polarized matte-black sunglasses. Offering 100% UV protection and a lightweight acetate frame for all-day comfort.

name: Stealth Bomber Jacket
description: A modern take on a classic silhouette. Water-resistant nylon shell with a quilted lining to keep you warm and dry without the bulk.

name: Essence Eau de Parfum
description: A sophisticated blend of sandalwood, bergamot, and spiced vanilla. A fragrance that lingers and makes a statement.

name: Studio Pro Headphones
description: Immersive sound with active noise cancellation. High-fidelity audio drivers and plush memory foam ear cups for ultimate studio-grade listening.

reviews.comment: Best noise cancellation in this price range.

name: Slim Card Wallet
description: Minimalist design for maximum efficiency. RFID-blocking technology and space for up to 8 cards and folded bills.
